# programs.wallust

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.wallust`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.wallust.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wallust color scheme generator. |
| `programs.wallust.package` | `null or package` | The wallust package to use. |
| `programs.wallust.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/wallust/wallust.toml`. See <https://explosion-mental.codeberg.page/wallust/config/> for documentation. |
